attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY, 
WFATD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
WFATD.ASSET_QTY,
WFATD.FA_TRANSACTION_DETAIL_TYPE,
WFATD.SS_CD, 
WFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD,
WFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
WFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT, 
WFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT, 
WFATD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
WFATD.JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, 
WFATD.COMPANY_CD,
WFATD.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT, 
WFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY,
WFATD.BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTL_TYPE_CD, 
WFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT,
WFATD.RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME, 
WFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_CREDIT_AMT,
WFATD.RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME,
WFATD.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
WFATD.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WFATD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
WFATD.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WFATD.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,
WFATD.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT,
WFATD.SS_TABLE_CD ,
WFATD.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE  ,  
WFATD.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD      ,   
WFATD.RU_BK_DPRCTN_PRD_SEQ_NUM_INT  ,
WFATD.FA_TRX_DETAIL_EFFECTIVE_DTM,
WFATD.FA_TRX_DETAIL_INEFFECTIVE_DTM, 
WFATD.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,  
WFATD.DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,  
WFATD.YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL WFATD
WHERE 
 NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL NFATD
              WHERE WFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY=NFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY)

SELECT
FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY    
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,ASSET_QTY                     
,FA_TRANSACTION_DETAIL_TYPE    
,SS_CD                         
,SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD               
,SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT        
,SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT         
,SK_GES_PK_ID_INT              
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT         
,COMPANY_CD                    
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT    
,FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY   
,BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTL_TYPE_CD 
,RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT   
,RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME  
,RU_FA_TRANSACTION_CREDIT_AMT  
,RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM            
,BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT 
,SS_TABLE_CD                   
,FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE      
,RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD         
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
,FA_TRX_DETAIL_EFFECTIVE_DTM   
,FA_TRX_DETAIL_INEFFECTIVE_DTM 
,CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
,DD_JE_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  
,DV_GL_POSTED_FLG              
,'DCD' AS DV_DEPRECIATION_TYPE    
FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_DCD  EMFAD
where not exists 
(  
select 1 from  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL MFAD
WHERE 
MFAD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY = EMFAD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY 
)

SELECT 
NFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY    
,NFATD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,NFATD.ASSET_QTY                     
,NFATD.FA_TRANSACTION_DETAIL_TYPE 
,NFATD.SS_CD  
,NFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD               
,NFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT        
,NFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT         
,NFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT              
,NFATD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,NFATD.JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT         
,NFATD.COMPANY_CD                    
,NFATD.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT    
,NFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY   
,NFATD.BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTL_TYPE_CD 
,NFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT   
,NFATD.RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME  
,NFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_CREDIT_AMT  
,NFATD.RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME
,NFATD.EDW_CREATE_DTM 
,NFATD.EDW_CREATE_USER
,NFATD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM 
,NFATD.EDW_UPDATE_USER
,NFATD.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM    
,-999 AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT        
,NFATD.SS_TABLE_CD                   
,NFATD.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE      
,NFATD.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD    
,RFW.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT              
,NFATD.FA_TRX_DETAIL_EFFECTIVE_DTM   
,NFATD.FA_TRX_DETAIL_INEFFECTIVE_DTM 
,NFATD.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,NFATD.DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,NFATD.YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
,NFATD.DD_JE_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,NFATD.DV_GL_POSTED_FLG  
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL NFATD
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FA_DEPRECIATION_PERIOD NFAD
ON NFATD.RU_BK_DPRCTN_PRD_SEQ_NUM_INT  = NFAD.BK_DPRCTN_PERIOD_SEQ_NUM_INT
AND NFAD.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD = NFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR RFW
ON RFW.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = NFAD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT      
WHERE RFW.DV_LATEST_WEEK_IN_MONTH_FLG   = 'Y'
AND NFATD.DV_GL_POSTED_FLG ='Y'
